title: Alcohol Vanilla Extract 2-Fold – 50 ml
content_text:
Alcoholic Vanilla Extract 2-Fold 
 Alcohol Vanilla Extract - 2-Fold 
 
 
Q1. What is a “2-Fold” vanilla extract? 
 
 
 
“2-Fold” means double concentration — this extract contains 200 g of vanilla pods per liter , which is twice the amount used in standard vanilla extracts. That higher ratio delivers a deeper, creamier, and longer-lasting vanilla flavor in every drop. 
 
Q2. How is it made? 
 
 
 
Our extract is produced directly at origin in Madagascar , using whole, ripe Grade A Bourbon pods (Vanilla planifolia) . Pods are carefully chopped, macerated, and extracted in food-grade ethanol and water , under controlled conditions. 
 
 The process captures the entire aromatic spectrum — vanillin, caramel, honey, dried fruit, and floral undertones — preserving the natural complexity that defines true Bourbon vanilla. 
 
Q3. Why alcohol-based? 
 
 
 
Ethanol is a natural solvent that extracts and stabilizes the widest range of aromatic compounds found in vanilla. An alcohol base (~35%) enhances both clarity and intensity , giving a sharper, more defined Bourbon profile and a longer shelf life — ideal for professional and industrial applications. 
 
Q4. What makes your extract different from others? 
 
 
 
Most commercial “vanilla” extracts are made outside Madagascar from spent beans, synthetic vanillin, or diluted tinctures , often labeled “Madagascar” without real origin traceability. Our extract is made at source , from fresh Grade A pods , double-strength, and never diluted — giving you authentic aroma, verified origin, and repeatable performance. 
 
Q5. What is the alcohol percentage? 
 
 
 It contains approximately 35% food-grade ethanol , used as a natural carrier and preservative. This concentration ensures optimal extraction and long-term stability, while remaining fully compliant with food-grade safety standards. 
Q6. What does it taste and smell like? 
 
 
 A deep, creamy-sweet aroma with bold vanillin, caramel, and honey notes. 
 Hints of dried fruit, woody, and floral tones give complexity, while the alcohol base enhances sharpness and purity. The finish is warm, rich, and lingering , the signature of genuine Bourbon vanilla from Madagascar 
Q7. How should I use it? 
 
 
 
Because it’s 2-Fold concentrated , you can use half the usual amount compared to regular extracts. Perfect for baking, confectionery, ice creams, chocolates, sauces, and beverages . 
 
 It performs consistently in both hot and cold preparations , maintaining flavor integrity even through heat or freezing. 
 
Q8. Can it be used in beverages or alcohol production? 
 
 
 
Absolutely. This extract is ideal for craft distilleries, liqueurs, flavored spirits, and gourmet beverages . Its alcohol base integrates seamlessly into liquid formulations without separation or loss of aroma. 
 Alcohol Vanilla Extract made in Madagascar 
 Our Bourbon Vanilla Extract 2-Fold Alcohol-Based is made directly at origin in Madagascar from fully ripened Grade A Bourbon vanilla pods . Containing 200 g of vanilla per liter , it delivers double the concentration of real vanilla compared to standard extracts — rich, bold, and aromatic. 
 Crafted using food-grade ethanol (~35%) and water , this extract unlocks the full spectrum of natural aromatic compounds — from dark chocolate and caramel to honey, dried fruit, and subtle floral notes . The alcohol base enhances both the sharpness and stability of the aroma, creating an extract that performs consistently across professional recipes. 
 
 Why It Stands Out 
 ✔️ Alcohol-based — made with food-grade ethanol (~35%) ✔️ Double-strength (2-Fold) — twice the vanilla of standard extracts ✔️ Produced at origin in Madagascar — from Grade A Bourbon pods ✔️ Authentic Bourbon profile — no synthetics, no dilution, no shortcuts ✔️ Stable and concentrated — consistent results for professionals 
 
 Applications 
 The 2-Fold Alcohol-Based Extract is designed for recipes that demand precision, depth, and a stable vanilla backbone . 
 ✔️ Premium baking & confectionery — cakes, pastries, fillings, and creams ✔️ Ice creams & frozen desserts — rich flavor that holds through freezing ✔️ Chocolates & pralines — complements cocoa with caramel sweetness ✔️ Custards & sauces — enhances both aroma and mouthfeel ✔️ Flavored spirits & liqueurs — ideal for distillers and craft mixology ✔️ Gourmet beverages & syrups — for signature coffee, tonics, or cocktails ✔️ Plant-based & nutritional recipes — authentic flavor in functional blends ✔️ Cosmetics & perfumery — adds depth and warmth to aromatic compositions 
 
 The Truth About Vanilla Extracts 
 Not all vanilla extracts are created equal. Many so-called “Madagascar” extracts are made thousands of kilometers from the source , using spent or low-grade beans , diluted alcohol, or synthetic vanillin — “authentic” only on the label. 
 Our extract is produced where Bourbon vanilla grows , using whole, ripe Grade A pods and controlled ethanol extraction to preserve the plant’s full complexity. The result is a true-origin, double-strength extract with consistency, purity, and a genuine Madagascar signature — trusted by chefs, chocolatiers, and distillers alike.

title: Alcohol-Free Vanilla Extract 2-Fold – 50 ml

Non-Alcoholic 2-Fold Vanilla Extract 
 Alcohol-Free Vanilla Extract 2-Fold 
 
 
Q1. What is a “2-Fold” vanilla extract? 
 
 
 
“2-Fold” means double concentration — this extract contains 200 g of vanilla pods per liter , which is twice the amount used in standard vanilla extracts. That higher ratio delivers a deeper, creamier, and longer-lasting vanilla flavor in every drop. 
 
Q2. How is this extract made? 
 
 
 
It’s produced directly in Madagascar , where the world’s finest Bourbon vanilla grows. Fully matured Grade A pods are slow-infused into natural cane syrup (0% alcohol) . This process extracts and preserves the complete aromatic profile — vanillin, caramel, honey, dried fruit, and subtle floral notes — without using ethanol or artificial solvents. 
 
Q3. What makes it different from typical vanilla extracts? 
 
 
 
Most extracts on the market are made far from the source using low-grade or spent beans , diluted with alcohol or mixed with synthetic vanillin. 
 
 Our extract is made at origin , from whole, ripe Bourbon pods , under controlled conditions in Madagascar. It’s pure, double-strength , and completely alcohol-free , ensuring a true Bourbon profile that’s both powerful and natural. 
 
Q4. Why alcohol-free? 
 
 
 Not every recipe or market can use alcohol. This extract was designed for ice creams, beverages, children’s products, halal formulations, plant-based foods, and cosmetics — where purity, compliance, and flavor stability matter most. It provides all the depth and authenticity of real vanilla, with zero ethanol content. 
Q5. What does it taste and smell like? 
 
 
 It has a deep, creamy-sweet aroma with clear vanillin, caramel, and honey notes. 
 The cane syrup base adds gentle natural sweetness and enhances smoothness, while subtle woody and floral undertones round out the finish. 
 Think of it as Madagascar Bourbon vanilla in its most elegant, mellow form — rich, full, and perfectly balanced. 
Q6. How should I use it in recipes? 
 
 
 
Use it exactly as you would a traditional extract — a few drops are enough to transform desserts, beverages, and sauces. 
 
 Because it’s thicker than alcohol-based extracts, it blends perfectly into cold or warm recipes and stays stable under freezing conditions, making it ideal for ice cream, dairy, and frozen desserts . 
 
Q7. Is it suitable for professional or industrial use? 
 
 
 
Yes. With its 2-Fold strength and consistent flavor profile, it’s designed for both artisanal and large-scale production. It disperses evenly, provides repeatable dosing, and meets clean-label and alcohol-free requirements, making it ideal for modern food manufacturing and export formulations. 
 
Q8. Can it be used in cosmetics or perfumery? 
 
 
 
Yes. Its natural aroma and alcohol-free composition make it ideal for alcohol-free perfumes, lotions, candles, and skincare formulations . It provides an authentic, soothing vanilla scent without the dryness associated with ethanol-based extracts. 
 VANILLA EXTRACT MADE IN MADAGASCAR 
 Our Bourbon Vanilla Extract 2-Fold Alcohol-Free is made directly at origin in Madagascar from fully ripened Bourbon Grade A vanilla pods . Containing 200 g of vanilla per liter , it delivers double the concentration of real vanilla compared to standard extracts — without a single drop of alcohol. 
 Using a natural cane syrup base (0% alcohol) , the extract captures and preserves the full aromatic spectrum of Bourbon vanilla — from deep caramel and dried fruit to warm, floral undertones. The result is a rich, syrupy extract that delivers the unmistakable profile of true Madagascar vanilla in its purest, most natural form. 
 
 Aroma & Flavor 
A deep, creamy-sweet aroma with pronounced vanillin, caramel, and dried-fruit notes. The cane syrup base adds a gentle, natural sweetness, while subtle woody, balsamic, and floral tones complete the composition. The flavor is smooth, warm, and long-lasting — ideal for recipes where alcohol is not desired. 
 
 
 Why It Stands Out 
 ✔️ Alcohol-free — made with natural cane syrup ✔️ Double-strength (2-Fold) — twice the vanilla of standard extracts ✔️ Produced at origin in Madagascar — from Grade A Bourbon pods ✔️ Authentic Bourbon profile — no synthetics, no dilution ✔️ Stable and consistent — reliable performance in every recipe 
 
 Applications 
 The Alcohol-Free 2-Fold Extract is perfect wherever purity and clean labeling matter most: 
 ✔️ Children’s desserts & baked goods — cakes, cookies, creams ✔️ Ice creams & frozen desserts — stable vanilla flavor with natural sweetness ✔️ Non-alcoholic beverages & syrups — lemonades, teas, mocktails, smoothies ✔️ Baby food & plant-based recipes — all-natural, alcohol-free formulation ✔️ Cosmetics & perfumery — rich vanilla scent with alcohol-free labeling 
 Because of its syrupy base, the extract blends seamlessly into both cold and hot preparations , ensuring consistent results and long-lasting aroma. 
 
 The Truth About Vanilla Extracts 
 Not all vanilla extracts are created equal. Many commercial “vanilla” products are made from low-grade or spent beans , stretched with alcohol or sugar syrups, or built on synthetic vanillin . Some are labeled “Madagascar” despite never touching Malagasy soil — authentic only on the label. 
 Our extract is different. It’s made at the source , from whole, Grade A Bourbon pods , under controlled conditions. The result is a full-bodied, natural extract with depth, consistency, and true traceability — the essence of real vanilla, made where vanilla actually grows.

BIO / ORGANIC Grade A Bourbon Vanilla Powder 
 BIO / ORGANIC Bourbon Vanilla Powder from Madagascar 
Q1. What makes your Bourbon Vanilla Powder different from others? 
 
 
 
Most vanilla powders on the market are made from spent, post-extraction pods — the flavorless leftovers from industrial vanilla production — often boosted with synthetic vanillin. 
 
 Our powder is made only from whole, non-extracted Grade A Bourbon pods from Madagascar , slow-cured and finely ground to preserve their full natural aroma. The result is pure, potent, and stable vanilla with real depth and sweetness — not a flat imitation. 
 
Q2. What is the vanillin and moisture content? 
 
 
 
Our Bourbon Vanilla Powder contains 1.6–2.2 % natural vanillin , giving it a rich, creamy-sweet profile. Moisture content is carefully maintained between 5–10 % to ensure ideal texture, stability, and aroma release. 
 
Q3. How can I use it? 
 
 
 ✔️ Baking & Desserts — cakes, cheesecakes, tarts, pastries ✔️ Chocolate & Ice Cream — consistent premium flavor ✔️ Drinks & Alcohols — coffee, hot chocolate, liqueurs ✔️ Smoothies & Protein Blends — natural sweetness without additives ✔️ Professional Use — bakery, confectionery, dairy, and cosmetics 
 The powder dissolves easily, blends smoothly, and ensures even flavor distribution in every recipe. 
Q4. Does it contain any additives or synthetics? 
 
 
 
No. It’s 100 % pure vanilla — no sugar, no carriers, no flavor enhancers, no synthetic vanillin. Just finely ground Vanilla planifolia pods. 
 
Q5. Where does the vanilla come from? 
 
 
 
batch is certified and traceable , confirming authentic origin and compliance with food-safety standards. 
 
Q6. Is it suitable for commercial or industrial use? 
 
 
 
Absolutely. The powder’s consistent aroma profile and controlled granulation (~400 µm) make it ideal for industrial food production, gelato, bakery, dairy, beverages, and cosmetics . It ensures predictable dosing, clean labeling, and reliable flavor output . 
 
Q7. Is your vanilla powder available in conventional form? 
 
 
 Yes — we offer both Conventional and BIO / Organic Certified versions. Each form maintains the same Grade A quality, with full traceability and laboratory documentation. – conventional powder 
Q8. What makes Bourbon vanilla from Madagascar so valued worldwide? 
 
 
 
Madagascar Bourbon vanilla owes its reputation to centuries of traditional curing , which develops a complex balance of vanillin, caramel, honey, and butter notes . The pods contain over 240 natural aromatic compounds , creating the rich, creamy aroma chefs and artisans across the world recognize instantly. 
 
 
 BIO / ORGANIC BOURBON VANILLA POWDER FROM MADAGASCAR 
 Our Bourbon Vanilla Powder is made exclusively from whole, non-extracted Grade A Bourbon pods from Madagascar — never spent or post-extraction material. This is why our powder carries exceptionally high vanillin content (1.6–2.2%) , a richer aroma, and a more stable flavor profile than typical vanilla powders. 
 What sets it apart isn’t just the origin — it’s the strict, traditional curing of the pods before grinding , which locks in high vanillin and the full spectrum of natural volatile compounds. After curing, the pods are carefully ground to a fine powder , creating an easy-to-use form without losing complexity or aroma. 
 The result is a rich, creamy, caramel-chocolate flavor with depth and staying power you won’t find in powders made from leftovers, synthetic additives, or so-called “mixes.” Our powder is lab-tested, fully documented, and traceable , and it complies with the strictest food-safety and clean-label standards. Available in BIO and Conventional forms, it delivers predictable dosing, stability, consistent quality, and genuine Bourbon flavor you can trust in every batch 
 
 THE REALITIES OF THE VANILLA POWDER MARKET 
 Most vanilla powders aren’t what they seem. Many come from spent or post-extraction pods with the flavor already stripped out . Some are even sold as “Madagascar natural vanilla” but boosted with synthetic vanillin to fake the aroma — authentic only on the label. 
 Others blend low-grade crops, end-of-shelf-life pods, scraps, tonka, or mis-stored beans from different regions, then market these powders as “mixes.” These shortcuts lead to fl at flavor, unstable batches, and compliance risks — especially without proper documentation.

 Bourbon Vanilla Powder – Madagascar

batch is certified and traceable , confirming authentic origin and compliance with food-safety standards.

Q7. Is your vanilla powder available in organic form?

Madagascar Bourbon vanilla owes its reputation to centuries of traditional curing , which develops a complex balance of vanillin, caramel, honey, and butter notes . content_text:
Bourbon Vanilla Seeds 
 BOURBON VANILLA SEEDS FROM MADAGASCAR (DRIED CAVIAR) 
 
 
Q1. What exactly are Bourbon vanilla seeds? 
 
 
 
Bourbon vanilla seeds — also known as dried vanilla caviar — are the tiny black seeds scraped from inside Grade A Bourbon pods. They are hand-separated and sun-dried to preserve their natural oils, fine texture, and signature aroma. These are the visible black specks found in real vanilla desserts, not synthetic flavorings or processed by-products. 
 
Q2. How are your seeds different from others on the market? 
 
 
 Many “vanilla seed” products are made from exhausted pods left after extraction or blended with fillers to mimic the look of real caviar. Our seeds are taken only from whole, non-extracted Bourbon pods grown and cured in Madagascar. No sugar, no carriers, no flavoring — just clean, pure seeds with traceable origin and certified authenticity. 
Q3. Do vanilla seeds add flavor or just the look? 
 
 
 
Both — but in different ways. Seeds provide a subtle, natural vanilla note and a luxurious visual cue that instantly signals “real vanilla.” For full flavor intensity, we recommend pairing them with Bourbon Vanilla Powder or Extract — powder deepens the taste, extract rounds out sweetness, and the seeds deliver that premium, speckled finish. 
 
Q4. Why are visible vanilla seeds so valuable in food production? 
 
 
 
Because they build trust and sell your product. Consumers associate the fine black specks with authenticity, craftsmanship, and quality. Whether in gelato, pastries, or sauces, those seeds instantly elevate perception — and justify premium pricing. 
 
Q5. How should I use vanilla seeds in recipes? 
 
 
 
Add them at the final stage of preparation for best results — especially in creams, custards, or ice cream bases. They disperse evenly and maintain their visual and aromatic quality. For baked goods or warm applications, the gentle heat releases their oils, enhancing aroma without losing intensity. 
 
Q6. Is it suitable for commercial or industrial use? 
 
 
 
Absolutely. The seeds are ideal for industrial food production, gelato, bakery, dairy, beverages, and cosmetics . It ensures predictable dosing, clean labeling, and reliable flavor output . 
 
Q7. Are the seeds certified and traceable? 
 
 
 
Yes. Every batch carries a Certificate of Origin from Madagascar and full documentation confirming traceability, non-GMO status, and absence of aflatoxins. Certificates

content_text:
Combava Powder 
 Combava Powder (Kaffir Lime) 
 
 
Q1. What is Combava Powder? 
 
 
 
Combava Powder is made from the zest of kaffir lime (Citrus hystrix) — a rare citrus fruit native to Southeast Asia and now grown in Madagascar. The peel is rich in natural essential oils and provides an intense, aromatic, and slightly spicy citrus flavor . It’s the secret ingredient behind the signature aroma of Thai, Indonesian, and Creole cuisine. 
 
Q2. How is it different from regular lime or lemon? 
 
 
 
Kaffir lime has a more complex and powerful aroma than ordinary lime — combining bright lime top notes with lemongrass, ginger, and subtle herbal tones . It’s sharper, greener, and more exotic — a single pinch delivers what would take an entire lime to replicate (and still wouldn’t come close). 
 
Q3. What makes your Combava Powder unique? 
 
 
 
Our powder is made from 100% pure kaffir lime zest , not juice or pulp. It takes 6 kg of fresh fruit to make 1 kg of powder , giving it six times the concentration of aroma compared to other citrus powders. It’s sourced directly from Madagascar , air-transported, lab-tested, and packaged in airtight DOYPAKs to preserve freshness, purity, and microbiological safety. No additives, carriers, or synthetics — just pure citrus intensity. 
 
Q4. How can I use it in cooking or production? 
 
 
 Combava Powder is incredibly versatile. Use it to bring brightness and depth to: ✔️ Curries, soups, sauces, marinades, and stir-fries ✔️ Sorbets, cakes, creams, and desserts ✔️ Teas, cocktails, syrups, and lemonades ✔️ Spice mixes, chocolates, and confectionery ✔️ Natural cosmetics and fragrances 
 A little goes a long way — start with 0.2–0.5% of your recipe weight and adjust to taste. 
Q5. Is it strong? How much should I use? 
 
 
 
Yes — it’s very concentrated. Because it’s made entirely from the zest (where all the essential oils are), you only need a small pinch or tip of a spoon to transform your dish. Overuse can overpower delicate flavors, so treat it like saffron: a little for aroma, a touch for magic. 
 
Q6. Is the product natural and additive-free? 
 
 
 
Absolutely. It’s 100% dried and ground kaffir lime peel — no added sugar, preservatives, or artificial flavors. Each batch is lab-tested and certified for purity, moisture, and aflatoxin absence. 
 – Rare Citrus from Madagascar 
 This is a spice you won’t find in regular stores. Combava — made from the aromatic kaffir lime ( Citrus hystrix ) — is a rare ingredient prized by chefs and culinary creators around the world. Now, it’s finally available in a convenient, finely milled form straight from Madagascar. 
 Our Combava Powder is made from 100% pure kaffir lime zest , the most aromatic part of the fruit, containing the highest concentration of natural citrus oils.  We’re among the few distributors in Europe — and the only one in Poland — offering authentic Madagascar Combava direct from origin. Each batch is lab-tested, air-shipped , and packed airtight to preserve its vivid color and intense fragrance. 
 
 How to Use Combava Powder 
 Combava Powder is all about unlocking bold, exotic freshness in your recipes. Its intensity means only a pinch is enough to elevate both sweet and savory dishes: 
 ✔️ Savory Dishes: Curries, soups, stir-fries, marinades, sauces — typical of Thai, Indonesian, and Creole cuisines ✔️ Desserts: Cakes, sorbets, ice creams, mousses, and creams — a bright citrus note that cuts through sweetness ✔️ Beverages: Teas, cocktails, syrups, lemonades — a refreshing, natural zest ✔️ Spice Blends & Chocolate: Adds a unique, modern citrus twist to premium products ✔️ Cosmetics & Perfumery: Pure, uplifting aroma perfect for soaps, scrubs, and natural fragrances

Q2. How is it different from regular lime or lemon? 
 
 
 
Kaffir lime has a more complex and powerful aroma than ordinary lime — combining bright lime top notes with lemongrass, ginger, and subtle herbal tones . It’s sharper, greener, and more exotic — a single pinch delivers what would take an entire lime to replicate (and still wouldn’t come close). 
 
Q3. What makes your Combava Powder unique? 
 
 
 
Our powder is made from 100% pure kaffir lime zest , not juice or pulp. It takes 6 kg of fresh fruit to make 1 kg of powder , giving it six times the concentration of aroma compared to other citrus powders. It’s sourced directly from Madagascar , air-transported, lab-tested, and packaged in airtight DOYPAKs to preserve freshness, purity, and microbiological safety. No additives, carriers, or synthetics — just pure citrus intensity. 
 
Q4. How can I use it in cooking or production? 
 
 
 Combava Powder is incredibly versatile. Use it to bring brightness and depth to: ✔️ Curries, soups, sauces, marinades, and stir-fries ✔️ Sorbets, cakes, creams, and desserts ✔️ Teas, cocktails, syrups, and lemonades ✔️ Spice mixes, chocolates, and confectionery ✔️ Natural cosmetics and fragrances 
 A little goes a long way — start with 0.2–0.5% of your recipe weight and adjust to taste. 
Q5. Is it strong? How much should I use? 
 
 
 
Yes — it’s very concentrated. Because it’s made entirely from the zest (where all the essential oils are), you only need a small pinch or tip of a spoon to transform your dish. Overuse can overpower delicate flavors, so treat it like saffron: a little for aroma, a touch for magic. 
 
Q6. Is the product natural and additive-free? 
 
 
 
Absolutely. It’s 100% dried and ground kaffir lime peel — no added sugar, preservatives, or artificial flavors. Each batch is lab-tested and certified for purity, moisture, and aflatoxin absence. 
 – Rare Citrus from Madagascar 
 This is a spice you won’t find in regular stores. Combava — made from the aromatic kaffir lime ( Citrus hystrix ) — is a rare ingredient prized by chefs and culinary creators around the world. Now, it’s finally available in a convenient, finely milled form straight from Madagascar. 
 Our Combava Powder is made from 100% pure kaffir lime zest , the most aromatic part of the fruit, containing the highest concentration of natural citrus oils. It takes around 6 kg of fresh fruit to produce 1 kg of powder , resulting in a powerful, natural aroma that instantly transforms your recipes with freshness and exotic depth. 
 We’re among the few distributors in Europe — and the only one in Poland — offering authentic Madagascar Combava direct from origin. Each batch is lab-tested, air-shipped , and packed airtight to preserve its vivid color and intense fragrance. 
 
 How to Use Combava Powder 
 Combava Powder is all about unlocking bold, exotic freshness in your recipes. Its intensity means only a pinch is enough to elevate both sweet and savory dishes: 
 ✔️ Savory Dishes: Curries, soups, stir-fries, marinades, sauces — typical of Thai, Indonesian, and Creole cuisines ✔️ Desserts: Cakes, sorbets, ice creams, mousses, and creams — a bright citrus note that cuts through sweetness ✔️ Beverages: Teas, cocktails, syrups, lemonades — a refreshing, natural zest ✔️ Spice Blends & Chocolate: Adds a unique, modern citrus twist to premium products ✔️ Cosmetics & Perfumery: Pure, uplifting aroma perfect for soaps, scrubs, and natural fragrances 
 Because it’s finely milled and evenly dispersible, Combava Powder delivers precise, repeatable results — ideal for home kitchens, artisanal production, and industrial applications alike. 
 
 Aroma Profile 
Combava Powder bursts with a bright, fresh citrus bouquet dominated by lime, layered with lemongrass, ginger, and light herbal notes. The dry form emphasizes purity and sharpness, ending with a clean, energetic finish free from artificial or chemical tones. 
 Why It Stands Out 
 ✔️ 100% pure kaffir lime zest — no fillers, no carriers, no sugar ✔️ 6:1 concentration — unmatched aroma and freshness ✔️ Rare and exclusive — sourced directly from Madagascar ✔️ Versatile — suitable for culinary, beverage, and cosmetic use ✔️ Lab-tested & clean label — guaranteed purity and traceability

 The result is an authentic, intensely aromatic powder — ideal for premium recipes, desserts, beverages, and industrial applications where a distinctive exotic citrus note truly stands out.

title: Madagascar Cocoa Beans – Trinitario Fine Flavour
content_text:
Fine Flavour Cocoa from Madagascar 
 Fine Flavour. Fully Traceable. Straight from Madagascar. 
 
 
 
1. What makes Madagascar cocoa different from other origins? 
 
 
 
 Madagascar’s volcanic soil, tropical climate, and smallholder fermentation practices create a unique flavor profile that sets it apart from mass-market cocoa. The beans develop a clean, bright chocolate taste with natural red-fruit and nutty notes , lower bitterness, and better aroma stability than most West African origins 
 
 
 
2. What variety of cocoa do you supply? 
 
 
 
We supply Trinitario cocoa , a fine-flavour hybrid of Criollo and Forastero varieties. It combines Criollo’s aromatic complexity with Forastero’s strength and yield stability — making it ideal for premium chocolate and cocoa processing. On request, we can also source and supply other cocoa varieties , including Criollo and Forastero , depending on origin availability, volume, and client requirements. 
 
 
3. How are the beans processed? 
 
 
 
Each batch is naturally fermented (80–90%) , sun-dried , and hand-sorted under strict quality control. This ensures proper flavor development, consistent moisture levels, and a clean, defect-free product ready for liquor, butter, and powder production 
 
 
4. What does Madagascar cocoa taste and smell like? 
 
 
 
 Madagascar cocoa has a deep, clean chocolate aroma — roasted and nutty with a gentle fruity sweetness that comes naturally from proper fermentation. The flavor is balanced and full-bodied , never smoky or bitter, and finishes smooth. Beans range from brown to dark brown , with a firm, dry texture and clean internal break — a clear sign of quality fermentation. 
 Want to experience it yourself? Request a sample and test the flavor difference firsthand. 
 
 
 
5. What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)? 
 
 
 
 We supply in bulk only . 
 
 
 
 Minimum Order: 25 metric tons 
 
 
 Packaging: Jute bags (60–65 kg net) 
 
 
 Container Options: 20′ or 40′ dry containers 
 
 
 Trade Terms: FOB Madagascar or CIF selected ports 
 
 
 
 
6. Is full traceability available? 
 
 
 
 Yes. Every lot is fully traceable to its origin farms and fermentation batches , supported by internal documentation and lab verification reports . 
 
 
 
7. Why is Madagascar cocoa more expensive? 
 
 
 
The beans have higher aroma compound levels , cleaner fermentation , and greater flavor yield per ton — meaning less raw cocoa is needed to achieve premium flavor intensity. It’s not just a better taste — it’s a more efficient ingredient for manufacturers focused on consistency and brand differentiation. 
 
 
8. Can it be used beyond chocolate manufacturing? 
 
 
 
Absolutely. Madagascar cocoa is used in confectionery, beverages, bakery, ice cream, craft brewing, cosmetics, and nutraceutical formulations , wherever clean-label, fine-flavour ingredients are required 
 
 
9. Who is this cocoa for? 
 
 
 
 Our Madagascar cocoa is supplied in industrial volumes to companies that rely on consistency and traceable quality. Typical clients include: 
 ✔️ Chocolate manufacturers and cocoa processors producing liquor, butter, and powder ✔️ Confectionery and bakery brands that value fine-flavour ingredients at scale ✔️ Ice cream, beverage, and distillery producers developing premium cocoa-based products ✔️ Cosmetic and nutraceutical manufacturers using pure, non-GMO cocoa in formulations 
 While we focus on bulk and long-term supply partnerships , we also provide samples for testing and product development before larger commitments. 
 
 Why Madagascar Cocoa Hits Different 
Madagascar’s soil is volcanic, the rain is balanced, and the climate does something special to cocoa pods — it pumps them full of natural sugars and amino acids. That’s the stuff that turns into real flavor when beans ferment. 
 
Local farmers still ferment in small wooden boxes using natural yeasts. No shortcuts, no smoke, no chemical smell — just clean, controlled fermentation that brings out the good stuff: bright chocolate, a hint of red fruit, a little nuttiness, and that warm caramel finish. 
 
✔️ Naturally high aroma precursor levels — rich in pyrazines, aldehydes, and esters ✔️ Lower bitterness and acidity compared to West African origins ✔️ A distinctively clean, bright chocolate profile with subtle fruit and nut tones 
 
 
 AROMA PROFILE – MADAGASCAR COCOA BEANS 
 Well-fermented Trinitario cocoa from Madagascar opens with a deep, clean cocoa aroma that’s naturally intense but never harsh. You’ll notice roasted nut and light caramel tones , rounded by a touch of red-fruit brightness that comes from the island’s fermentation style. The flavor is balanced and full-bodied — pure chocolate with a smooth, dry finish and no smoky or mouldy edges. 
 ✔️ Chocolate & Cocoa Liquor — creates a stable base with clear cocoa intensity ✔️ Cocoa Butter & Powder — gives warm color and a rich, roasted aroma ✔️ Confectionery & Ice Cream — adds depth without bitterness ✔️ Craft Beverages & Distillates — infuses clean chocolate character with subtle fruit notes 
 To unlock the full profile, roast gently to preserve the natural fruity acids developed during fermentation. The result is a refined chocolate flavor — rich, aromatic, and unmistakably Madagascar.

 Bourbon Vanilla Pods from Madagascar 
 
 
Q1. What makes Bourbon vanilla pods from Madagascar special? 
 
 
 
Bourbon vanilla from Madagascar is considered the world’s finest due to its traditional curing process, which develops a rich, creamy-sweet aroma with notes of caramel, honey, and butter. The pods contain over 240 natural aromatic compounds and a high vanillin content, making them more complex and stable than vanilla from other regions.

Each pod is over 19 cm long , soft, oily, and shiny. They are classified as Grade A – Gourmet Quality , which means they are the thickest and most aromatic beans available.

Q4. How can I use Bourbon vanilla pods in cooking or baking? 
 
 
 
To use them fully, split the pod lengthwise and scrape out the seeds to add to your dish. You can also place the empty pod in sugar, milk, or alcohol to create natural infusions or extracts that carry the same authentic aroma.

Yes. Each batch comes with a certificate of origin from Madagascar , confirming authenticity, traceability, and compliance with food safety standards. The beans are lab-verified and tested to ensure no detectable aflatoxins . Certificates

 Our vanilla comes exclusively from verified producers in Madagascar , the world’s leading origin for genuine Bourbon vanilla. The pods are hand-picked, sun-dried, and cured traditionally to achieve maximum aroma and quality consistency

title: Premium Madagascar Cocoa Mass 5kg
content_text:
Cocoa mass From Mdagascar 
 
 
1. What is cocoa mass? 
 
 
 Cocoa mass (also called cocoa liquor) is the pure, ground form of fermented and roasted cocoa beans — containing both cocoa solids and cocoa butter. It’s the base ingredient for chocolate, cocoa butter, and cocoa powder. 
2. What makes Madagascar cocoa mass different? 
 
 
 
The island’s Trinitario beans are prized for their bright, fruity flavour and balanced acidity . Unlike many origins, Madagascar cocoa delivers a cleaner, more aromatic liquor with no harsh or smoky notes. 
 
3. Is this cocoa mass alkalized? 
 
 
 
No — it’s 100 % natural, non-alkalized , preserving the authentic colour and natural flavour of Madagascar cocoa. 
 
4. Who is it for? What are the typical applications? 
 
 
 
Perfect for bean-to-bar producers, chocolatiers, pastry chefs, ice cream makers , and formulators seeking consistent, fine-flavour cocoa ingredients. 
 
Our cocoa mass is versatile and ideal for: ✔️ Chocolate production (bean-to-bar, couverture) ✔️ Pastry, desserts, and pralines ✔️ Ice cream and beverages ✔️ Cocoa butter and powder processing ✔️ Premium cosmetic or nutraceutical formulations 
 
6. What does “non-alkalized” mean? 
 
 
 
 Non-alkalized means the cocoa is 100% natural , without chemical treatment. It keeps the original reddish-brown color , bright fruit notes , and natural antioxidants typical of fine-flavour Madagascar cocoa. 
 
7. Is it allergen-free and GMO-free? 
 
 
 
Yes. It’s non-GMO , gluten-free , non-irradiated , and contains no major allergens such as dairy, soy, or nuts. 
 
8. Can I request samples? 
 
 
 
Yes — samples are available for professional testing and formulation development. Contact us to request availability and shipping details. 
 Why Madagascar Cocoa Mass Stands Out 
 Madagascar’s volcanic soil and tropical microclimate naturally enrich its cocoa with high levels of sugars and amino acids — the essential precursors of flavour. During fermentation and roasting, these compounds create a distinctive sensory curve : ✔️ Clean, rich cocoa intensity ✔️ Subtle red-fruit and caramel notes ✔️ Low bitterness and controlled acidity 
 It’s flavour precision at origin — not a commodity, but an ingredient engineered for consistency. 
 
 Aroma Profile – Madagascar Cocoa Mass 
 A warm, roasted cocoa aroma leads, followed by soft caramel and light fruit notes. The taste is full-bodied, balanced, and naturally sweet , with a smooth melt and no smoky or mouldy edges.

 5-Piece Bourbon Vanilla Gift Set 
 
 
 
Q1. What makes this set unique? 
 
 
 
Each product in the set is made directly in Madagascar from whole, non-extracted Grade A Bourbon vanilla pods — never from leftovers or synthetic blends. The alcohol-based version (≈ 35 %) highlights sharper, more pronounced aromatic notes — ideal for confectionery and baking. The alcohol-free version (cane-syrup base) delivers a smoother, sweeter profile suited for ice creams, children’s desserts, or halal and plant-based recipes.

 Yes — every product in the set is 100 % natural, free from additives, preservatives, colorants, and synthetics. Only pure vanilla and kaffir lime are used.
